recipes.title: Classic Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: Traditional Italian pizza with fresh basil

recipes.title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipes.description: Soft and chewy classic cookies

recipes.title: Chicken Stir-Fry
recipes.description: Quick and healthy weeknight dinner
instructions: Season with soy sauce and ginger

recipes.title: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Authentic Mexican street tacos

recipes.title: Greek Salad
recipes.description: Fresh Mediterranean salad

recipes.title: Sushi Roll
recipes.description: California roll with fresh ingredients

recipes.title: Vegetable Curry
recipes.description: Spicy Indian curry

recipes.title: Berry Smoothie Bowl
recipes.description: Healthy breakfast bowl

recipes.title: Pasta Carbonara
recipes.description: Classic Italian pasta dish

recipes.title: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
recipes.description: Nutritious grain bowl

recipes.title: Shrimp Scampi
recipes.description: Garlicky shrimp pasta dish
instructions: Sauté shrimp in garlic and oil

recipes.title: Stir-Fried Tofu
recipes.description: Vegetarian Asian stir-fry

recipes.title: Grilled Salmon with Asparagus
recipes.description: Healthy grilled salmon with roasted asparagus
instructions: Season salmon with garlic, lemon, and oil
Trim asparagus and toss with oil

recipes.title: Almond-Crusted Chicken
recipes.description: Crispy almond-crusted chicken cutlets
instructions: Dip chicken in egg then almond coating

recipes.title: Lemon Garlic Pasta
recipes.description: Light and fresh lemon garlic pasta

recipes.title: Shakshuka
recipes.description: North African eggs simmered in spiced tomato peppers
instructions: Sauté onion and bell pepper until softened
Cover and cook until eggs are set

recipes.title: Besan Chilla
recipes.description: Savory Indian chickpea flour pancakes with herbs
instructions: Whisk chickpea flour with water into a thin batter
Fold in vegetables, herbs, and spices
Cook each pancake until browned on both sides
Serve warm with chutney or yogurt

recipes.title: Masala Tofu Scramble
recipes.description: Spiced tofu scramble with peppers and greens
instructions: Sauté onion and bell pepper until tender
Add tofu, turmeric, and nutritional yeast
Cook until the scramble is hot and lightly browned

recipes.title: Overnight Oats
recipes.description: Make-ahead oats with berries, banana, and chia
instructions: Combine oats, almond milk, chia, and maple syrup
Top with berries and sliced banana

recipes.title: Egg Muffin Cups
recipes.description: Meal-prep egg cups with turkey sausage and spinach
instructions: Brown turkey sausage and drain excess fat
Divide sausage, spinach, pepper, and cheese into muffin cups

recipes.title: Arepa de Huevo
recipes.description: Colombian corn arepas filled with egg
instructions: Mix masarepa with warm water into a soft dough
Open each arepa and add an egg
Return to the skillet and cook until the egg is set

recipes.title: Mushroom Congee
recipes.description: Comforting rice porridge with mushrooms and ginger
instructions: Rinse rice until the water runs mostly clear
Simmer rice with broth and ginger
Cook until the grains break down into porridge
Top congee with mushrooms and green onion

recipes.title: Black Bean Burrito Bowl
recipes.description: Southwestern rice bowl with beans, corn, and avocado
instructions: Top with beans, vegetables, lime, and cilantro

recipes.title: Mujadara
recipes.description: Middle Eastern lentils and rice with caramelized onions
instructions: Caramelize sliced onions in olive oil
Season lentils and rice with cumin

recipes.title: Cold Peanut Noodle Salad
recipes.description: Chilled rice noodles with peanut-lime dressing
instructions: Cook rice noodles and rinse under cold water
Whisk peanut butter, tamari, lime, and sesame oil
Toss noodles with vegetables and dressing

recipes.title: Vietnamese Rice Paper Rolls
recipes.description: Fresh rolls with tofu, herbs, and crisp vegetables
instructions: Cook noodles and cool them completely
Cut tofu and vegetables into thin strips
Soften rice paper sheets in warm water
Fill each sheet with noodles, tofu, vegetables, and herbs

recipes.title: Falafel Salad
recipes.description: Crispy chickpea patties over fresh greens with tahini
instructions: Mash chickpeas with parsley and cumin
Shape the mixture into small patties
Arrange romaine, cucumber, and tomato in bowls

recipes.title: Tuna Nicoise Salad
recipes.description: French composed salad with tuna, potatoes, and eggs
instructions: Arrange vegetables, tuna, and eggs on plates
Drizzle with olive oil before serving

recipes.title: Thai Turkey Lettuce Wraps
recipes.description: Low-carb lettuce cups with ginger turkey filling
instructions: Brown turkey in a hot skillet

recipes.title: Misir Wat
recipes.description: Ethiopian red lentil stew with berbere spice
instructions: Add garlic, ginger, and berbere spice
Stir in red lentils and tomatoes
Serve warm as a thick stew

recipes.title: Jollof Rice with Plantain
recipes.description: West African tomato rice with sweet fried plantain
instructions: Blend tomatoes, onion, and bell pepper into a sauce
Cook the sauce in olive oil until thickened

recipes.title: Spicy Garlic Edamame
recipes.description: Japanese-style edamame tossed with garlic and tamari
instructions: Sauté garlic and chili flakes in oil

recipes.title: Crispy Roasted Chickpeas
recipes.description: Crunchy spiced chickpeas for snacking
instructions: Toss with oil, cumin, and paprika

recipes.title: Pao de Queijo
recipes.description: Brazilian gluten-free cheese bread bites
instructions: Bake until puffed and lightly golden

recipes.title: Som Tam
recipes.description: Thai green papaya salad with lime and peanuts
instructions: Whisk lime juice with tamari and chili flakes
Toss papaya, carrot, and tomato with dressing
